name: @igorjs/gh-actions-clean-workflow
description: Github Action to delete old workflow runs

scripts.test: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' pure-test src/index.test.ts src/lib/api.test.ts src/lib/circuit-breaker.test.ts src/lib/params.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' pure-test src/index.test.ts src/lib/api.test.ts src/lib/circuit-breaker.test.ts src/lib/params.test.ts --watch
scripts.test:coverage: mkdir -p coverage/tmp && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/tmp NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx/esm' pure-test src/index.test.ts src/lib/api.test.ts src/lib/circuit-breaker.test.ts src/lib/params.test.ts && node scripts/coverage-report.cjs
scripts.all: pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run build

author: Igor J. S. <oss@mail.igorjs.io> (https://igorjs.io/)
